name: Blank Workflow
description: Start with an empty automated workflow that you design yourself — pick this if you already know the steps you want and want to build it from scratch.

fields.name: workflowName
fields.label: What should we call this workflow?
fields.helpText: Use a name that describes what this workflow will do. You'll design the actual steps after it's created.

name: Workflow + File Storage
description: Set up an automated workflow that can also save and read files — useful when your process needs to store documents or data as it runs.

fields.name: workflowName
fields.label: What should we call this workflow?
fields.helpText: Use a name that describes what this workflow will do. You'll design the actual steps after it's created.

steps.title: Storage Details
steps.description: Give the file storage a name.

fields.name: storageAccountName
fields.label: What should we call the file storage?
fields.helpText: Lowercase letters and numbers only, no spaces or symbols.
